title: Ranunculus intervallicarens
taxonomy: Ranunculus intervallicarens is classified within the family Ranunculaceae and the order Ranunculales. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. Furthermore, its classification can be broken down into the class Magnoliopsida and the division Magnoliophyta. This species can be found in the family Ranunculaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the buttercup family. Ranunculus intervallicarens shares its classification with other plants in the Ranunculaceae family, such as the common buttercup.
